emotional_tone: Airy, High-Fashion, Understated Elegance, Editorial, Ultra-Premium

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-24), Negative Space, Asymmetry
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use The 'Bento' Grid Protocol or Swiss Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with gap-8 to gap-12. Let imagery span wide columns.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat solid surfaces. No shadow or very subtle shadow-sm. Sharp edges (rounded-none) or very minimal 2px rounding. 1px delicate borders in border-stone-200.
surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glass or Solid Background. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px delicate inner stroke border-white/40.
surface_strategies.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white hover:bg-[#333333]. Secondary: bg-transparent text-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#F2EFEB]. Sharp corners or rounded-none. uppercase text-xs tracking-widest.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Images slightly scale up inside overflow-hidden containers (duration-700 ease-out). Buttons translate-y-[-1px] with shadow-md.
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Elements fade up on scroll entry.
motion_and_interaction.microinteractions: Delicate line expansions on hover for nav links. Image overlays fade to clear.

page_specific_directions.homepage: Hero should be a massive editorial image. Overlay should be very subtle gradient, not a solid mask. Feature sections should alternate between wide image blocks and generous text areas with delicate typography.
page_specific_directions.shop_grid: Clean grid, emphasis on high-quality product photography. Minimal details under the product (Title in Serif, Price in Sans). Hover shows 'Add to Cart' or second image.
page_specific_directions.product_detail: Editorial 50/50 split. Massive sticky image on left. Right side: Title, Price, Box personalization form (Shadcn customized forms), Delivery date logic with Shadcn Calendar. Use thin dividing lines between options.
page_specific_directions.weddings_services: Gallery style layout. Staggered imagery. Large typography sections describing the bespoke process. Inquiry form at the bottom.
page_specific_directions.sympathy_tributes: Subtle, quiet design. More negative space. Pale sage accents.
page_specific_directions.corporate_events: Structured bento grid. Professional yet luxurious.
page_specific_directions.bespoke_portfolio: Masonry gallery. Hover to reveal 'Enquire similar'. Filterable tabs.

image_urls.description: Hero delicate blush roses wrapped elegantly.
Elegant table setting with floral centerpiece.
Dewy luxury red and white roses close up.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

component_instructions.shadcn_overrides: Do not build native HTML advanced inputs. Heavily customize Shadcn Dialog, Select, Calendar, Tabs. Override border radius (rounded-none), change ring colors to stone-200, use Playfair Display or Montserrat appropriately.
component_instructions.cards: Do not overuse the Card component for product layout. Use raw HTML div for more asymmetrical layout freedom.
